response.step_by_step_log: I analyzed the video and the audio. The video consists of dialogue from multiple characters, sound effects, and instrumental background music. I listened carefully to the background music to check for any vocal components. Since no vocal music was identified in the video, I have set 'contains_vocal_music' to 'false' for all detected scenes and have not performed any web searches for songs.
response.global_summary: This video features VTubers Sakura Miko, Ookami Mio, and AZKi in a virtual environment. They are interacting with a zombie character in a game-like scenario, then Kureiji Ollie appears on a screen to initiate a 'surprise test' to see if they are fit to be secret agents. The video consists of dialogue and game interactions accompanied by instrumental background music. There are no vocal songs present.

scenes.description: VTubers interact with a zombie character and discuss the situation.
Kureiji Ollie appears on a large screen to announce a surprise test for the VTubers.
VTubers prepare for the first round of the test.
AZKi participates in the first round of the surprise test, trying to guess an object in a box.
Ookami Mio participates in the next round of the test, trying to guess the object.
